description: For a due diligence project, an agent must compile a background report on a target company.

nodes.task_description: Find the company's official registration details, address, and list of directors.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves correct corporate information from official registries.

nodes.task_description: Search for any recent negative news or litigation involving the company.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds and summarizes any relevant negative news.

nodes.task_description: Compile the information into a structured background report.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a clean report with all the gathered information.
